Hero.heading: Generalist by choice
Hero.intro: I work across electronics design, embedded firmware, control systems, and mechanical engineering, from circuit boards to working mechanisms.

Philosophy.heading: Engineering philosophy
Philosophy.p1: There are several proper ways to solve any engineering problem. A proper solution is one considered from every relevant point of view: in accordance with established standards, procedures, and the specifications of the project. The engineer's role, unlike the scientist's, is to identify and deliver that solution.
Philosophy.p2: Proper means technically sound, but also manufacturable, safe, maintainable, and reproducible. Standards and procedures are not bureaucracy: they are accumulated knowledge about how solutions fail in the real world. Meeting them is my job.
Philosophy.quote: “Proper” is one of my favorite words in English. Every time I face a new challenge, I find myself asking the same question: what are the proper ways to approach this?

electromechanical.title: Electromechanical systems
electromechanical.description: Actuators, sensors, and electronics codesigned with mechanical structure: tolerance stack-ups, mounting, routing, and assembly considered from the first sketch.

embedded.title: Embedded systems & firmware
embedded.description: Firmware on STM32 and ESP32 with FreeRTOS, industrial protocols including CAN, I2C, and BLE, and control logic for real-time hardware operation.

electronicsPcb.title: Electronics & PCB design
electronicsPcb.description: Schematic capture, layout, and reliability testing using KiCad and Altium: from breadboard prototype to production-ready board with measurement and validation routines.

mechanical.title: Mechanical design & manufacturing
mechanical.description: 3D models and drawings in SolidWorks and Fusion 360, with DFMA and GD&T applied from day one: CNC machining, 3D printing, and supplier-ready documentation.

ContactCTA.heading: Let's build something exciting.
ContactCTA.subtitle: Got an idea worth building? Let's talk.

CV.metaDescription: Curriculum vitae of Leonardo Acha Boiano, mechatronics engineer with expertise in electronics design, embedded systems, control engineering, and mechanical design for robotics and industrial applications.
CV.summary: Mechatronics engineer with professional experience in robotics, embedded systems, and product design. Skilled in developing innovative solutions for complex engineering challenges, with a strong track record in problem-solving, teamwork, and contributing to advanced technology projects in international environments.

differentialDriveRobot.title: Differential Drive Robot
differentialDriveRobot.description: Mobile robot with custom PCB, 3D-printed DFMA parts, and closed-loop motor control achieving 5% error margin

smokeDetectorCamera.title: Smoke Detector Camera
smokeDetectorCamera.description: IoT smoke detection device integrating ESP32CAM, C firmware on ESP-IDF, and SolidWorks-designed housing for remote monitoring

propellerArm.title: Propeller Levitated Arm
propellerArm.description: Dual-propeller levitation rig with IMU feedback and MATLAB-validated control algorithm, complex parts manufactured via 3D printing

hotPlate.title: Hot Plate for SMD Soldering
hotPlate.description: SMD reflow hot plate with MATLAB-designed temperature controller, capable of tracking a reflow curve or holding a setpoint

canCrusher.title: Can Crusher System
canCrusher.description: Automatic can crusher with electropneumatic control circuits designed in Fluidsim and mechanism modeled in SolidWorks

batteryTrolley.title: Portable Battery Trolley
batteryTrolley.description: Field-tested trolley under 20 kg carrying 200-250 kg of batteries, stress-simulated in SolidWorks and taken to production by Swiss Contact

temperatureAlarm.title: Analog Temperature Alarm

bullets: Developing and maintaining **ROS2** robotic systems, including concurrent actions and hardware integration

bullets: Implemented new test methods, including instrument selection, integration, and coding measurement routines

Facilitated product development and logistics coordination with Chinese business partners
Assisted the tech team in integrating **MQTT** and **CAN-based IoT** batteries into the existing workflow through APIs
Designed and prototyped solenoid actuators and control **PCB** tailored to secure electric motorcycles' batteries
Developed rapid prototypes to validate and iterate on innovative engineering designs
Created detailed component designs using **SolidWorks** and CAD software for manufacturing
